title: Netlify MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Netlify MCP Server for Claude
Create, deploy, and manage websites on Netlify platform
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** Netlify
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `deployment` `netlify` `hosting` `static-sites` `serverless`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status netlify
```

## Config
```json
{
  "netlify": {
    "url": "https://netlify-mcp.netlify.app/mcp",
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status netlify

## Links
- https://heyclau.de/mcp/netlify-mcp-server
- https://docs.netlify.com/build/build-with-ai/netlify-mcp-server/
